features.autoEnrollText: Automatically enrolled participants have their deferral rate set at a rate of 3% of annual eligible Plan compensation with automatic increases of 1% after each succeeding anniversary the employee was enrolled, not to exceed 6% of annual eligible Plan compensation.

features.autoEnrollText: (7) MAY 31, 2024 (AUDITED), DECEMBER 31, 2023 (AUDITED), AND DECEMBER 31, 2022 (COMPILED) NOTE 1 DESCRIPTION OF PLAN (CONTINUED) Contributions (Continued) The Participating Employers in the Plan may elect automatic enrollment and escalation features.

features.matchText: The Company has elected to make a matching contribution which is a 50% match of an employee’s contribution up to 6% of an employee’s compensation as defined.
features.vestingText: Participants are 100% vested in the Companies' matching and profit-sharing contributions after four years and in the event of death, disability, or satisfying the conditions for early retirement.
features.rothText: Additionally, participants can make Roth contributions to the Plan, and participants aged 50 or older, who are making contributions to the Plan, are allowed catch-up contributions as defined in the Plan.
features.eligibilityText: Eligible employees become participants on the first day of the month coinciding with or following the date on which entry requirements were fulfilled.
features.loansText: Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow from their fund accounts a minimum of $1,000 up to a maximum equal to the lesser of $50,000 or 50% of their vested account balance.
features.autoEnrollText: Automatically enrolled participants have their deferral rate set at 5% of eligible compensation and their contributions invested in a designated fund until changed by the participant.

features.matchText: The Company makes safe harbor matching contributions of 100 percent of employees’ salary deferral amounts on the first 4 percent of employees’ compensation and 50 percent of the amount of the participant’s elective deferrals that exceed 4 percent of the participant’s compensation, but do not exce…
features.vestingText: Due to the partial plan termination that occurred during 2023, all participants in the Plan with termination dates during 2023 were determined to be 100% vested in all types of employer contributions.
features.eligibilityText:  Long-term part-time employees are now eligible to participate in the Plan after meeting the service requirement of three consecutive eligibility computation periods with at least 500 hours of service in each period.
features.loansText: Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow from their fund accounts a minimum of $1,000 up to a maximum equal to the lesser of $50,000 or 50 percent of their account balance.

features.vestingText: Vesting Participants are immediately vested in their contributions and discretionary non-elective employer contributions plus actual earnings thereon.
features.loansText: January 31, 2024 and NOTE 1: DESCRIPTION OF PLAN (concluded) Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow from their fund accounts a minimum of $1,000 up to a maximum equal to the lesser of $50,000 or 50% of their vested account balance.

features.vestingText: Vesting Participants are immediately vested in their contributions and company profit-sharing contributions plus actual earnings thereon.
features.loansText: Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow the lesser of $50,000 (reduced by the participant’s highest outstanding loan balance during the 12-month period ending on the date of the loan) or 50 percent of their vested account.

features.vestingText: A participant vests 20% for each year of service with at least 1,000 hours of service and is 100% vested after five years of credited service.
